data.content: Implementation review approved. Two-button retake dialog (Stage / Retake Now) correctly implements the spec: Stage applies state+reason only, Retake Now also triggers a Take session. Repo-scoping fix from prior review is properly addressed via retake-session-scope.ts with repoScopedBeatKey(). Rolling ancestor logic extracted to shared utility. All quality gates pass (tsc, 2062 tests, build). No security issues or regressions.
